avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — every overbought chase entry has lost; hard ceiling at 60, no exceptions ever

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket Jun 29; D 58.2 premarket Jun 30; AMGN 54.4 premarket Jul 1) have routinely surged past 60 on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic; do NOT enter within first 5-10 minutes of open even if premarket RSI was clean

notes_for_next_session:
FOR EVENING SCAN AGENT (July 1, 2026) AND PREMARKET/ENTRY AGENTS (July 2, 2026):

STATUS: Zero open positions. Zero trades completed today. Equity $99,938.80.

=== UNIVERSE REFRESH IS THE #1 MANDATORY ACTION ===
The defensives/utilities/managed-care universe has produced ZERO viable entries over 26 sessions. The evening scan MUST rebuild the universe from scratch using higher-volatility sectors:
  — Technology (semiconductors, software, cloud, cybersecurity)
  — Biotech/healthcare (SMID-cap biotech, medical devices)
  — Energy (E&P, oilfield services)
  — Industrials/aerospace/defense
  — Consumer discretionary
Minimum ATR% requirement is 0.30%. Every candidate must clear this FIRST before any RS/VCP/RSI scoring. Do not carry forward any name from the current dead universe into the new one.

=== RSI RULES (NON-NEGOTIABLE) ===
• Entry RSI window: 55-60 ONLY (live bar, not premarket)
• Hard ceiling: 60 — any live RSI above 60 = instant skip, no exceptions
• Hard floor: 55 — RSI below 55 = momentum insufficient
• Opening-bar surge: wait 5-10 minutes after open before evaluating; premarket RSI is unreliable

=== MARKET REGIME ===
SPY DOWN (27th+ consecutive session). 5-position cap applies. Be selective. Gap-up trap risk is elevated in a downtrend.

=== CALENDAR NOTE ===
July 3 (Friday) is likely NYSE-closed for Independence Day observance. Verify this in the premarket agent. If markets close early July 2, adjust entry/exit windows accordingly.
